shallow_crypts.name: The Shallow Crypts
shallow_crypts.description: Crumbling tombs where restless dead still wander.

monsters.name: Hollow Sentinel
monsters.description: An empty suit of armor, animated by fading spite.

monsters.name: Crypt Rat Swarm
monsters.description: Hundreds of pale vermin, moving as one.

monsters.name: Bone Warden
monsters.description: A skeleton fused to the wall, still swinging its rusted blade.

monsters.name: Dust Wraith
monsters.description: A whisper given form — barely visible, but its touch chills to the marrow.

monsters.name: Grave Tender
monsters.description: Once a caretaker. Now it tends the dead with... enthusiasm.

discovery.title: Forgotten Alcove
discovery.description: Your hero finds a recess in the wall, hidden behind crumbling mortar. Something glints inside.

discovery.title: Ancient Inscription
discovery.description: Faded runes carved into the floor. Your hero traces them, gaining a fragment of old knowledge.

discovery.title: Collapsed Passage
discovery.description: The ceiling gives way behind your hero. No turning back — only forward.

trap.title: Pressure Plate
trap.description: A click underfoot. Darts fly from the walls — your hero rolls aside, mostly unscathed.

trap.title: False Floor
trap.description: The stones give way. A short fall into cold water. Your hero climbs out, shaken but whole.

rest.title: Quiet Chamber
rest.description: An empty room. The air is still. Your hero catches their breath before pressing on.

rest.title: Abandoned Campfire
rest.description: Someone was here before. The embers are cold, but the shelter remains.

boss.name: The Warden Below
boss.description: A massive figure of rusted iron and fused bone, blocking the deepest passage. It has not moved in centuries — until now.

ember_mines.name: The Ember Mines
ember_mines.description: Abandoned mining shafts where fire still burns in the deep rock.

monsters.name: Cinder Crawler
monsters.description: An insect the size of a hound, its carapace glowing with trapped heat.

monsters.name: Soot Phantom
monsters.description: A shape in the smoke. It solidifies just long enough to strike.

monsters.name: Molten Husk
monsters.description: A miner who never left. The fire took everything but the hunger.

monsters.name: Ember Tick
monsters.description: Small. Fast. Latches on and drains warmth until your hero pries it free.

monsters.name: Forge Golem
monsters.description: Slag and steel fused by underground heat into a shambling guardian.

monsters.name: Vein Stalker
monsters.description: It moves through cracks in the rock. You only see it when it wants you to.

discovery.title: Ore Vein
discovery.description: A seam of dark metal pulses with faint heat. Your hero pockets a shard.

discovery.title: Miner's Cache
discovery.description: A locked chest beneath a collapsed beam. Inside — supplies left by someone who never returned.

discovery.title: Underground Spring
discovery.description: Cool water in a burning place. Your hero drinks deeply and presses on refreshed.

trap.title: Gas Pocket
trap.description: A hiss from the wall. Noxious fumes fill the tunnel. Your hero covers their face and pushes through.

trap.title: Unstable Shaft
trap.description: The ground shakes. Rocks fall. Your hero sprints through the collapse.

rest.title: Cool Alcove
rest.description: A pocket of breathable air away from the heat. Your hero rests against the cool stone.

rest.title: Old Elevator Platform
rest.description: The mechanism is broken, but the platform makes a decent resting spot.

boss.name: Furnace Heart
boss.description: The mine's core — a mass of molten rock and twisted metal that beats like a living organ. It does not want you to leave.

hollow_deep.name: The Hollow Deep
hollow_deep.description: A vast cavern system where sound itself seems to decay.

monsters.name: Shade Crawler
monsters.description: It has too many legs. They make no sound on the stone.

monsters.name: Echo Devourer
monsters.description: It eats sound. Near it, your hero's footsteps vanish and their heartbeat becomes deafening.

monsters.name: Hollow Knight
monsters.description: Armor without a body. Sword without a hand. It fights as if remembering a war long ended.

monsters.name: Abyssal Leech
monsters.description: Translucent. Enormous. It drops from the ceiling without warning.

monsters.name: Stone Singer
monsters.description: It hums a note that makes the walls weep. Your hero's bones vibrate in sympathy.

monsters.name: Void Spinner
monsters.description: A spider of pure darkness. Its web is invisible until you're in it.

monsters.name: Deep Watcher
monsters.description: A single eye, embedded in the cave wall. It follows. It always follows.

discovery.title: Crystalline Chamber
discovery.description: The walls explode with color — bioluminescent crystals light a hidden grotto. Your hero gathers what they can.

discovery.title: Petrified Explorer
discovery.description: A previous adventurer, turned to stone mid-stride. Their pack still holds useful supplies.

discovery.title: Underground River
discovery.description: Black water flowing in silence. Your hero follows it deeper and finds a new passage.

trap.title: Sound Trap
trap.description: A chamber that amplifies every noise. Your hero's breathing draws attention from deeper in.

trap.title: Gravity Anomaly
trap.description: The floor becomes the ceiling for a terrifying moment. Your hero lands hard but keeps moving.

rest.title: Fungal Garden
rest.description: Soft bioluminescent moss carpets a small chamber. The air is surprisingly fresh.

rest.title: Abandoned Outpost
rest.description: Someone tried to establish a base here. They failed, but left behind useful remnants.

boss.name: The Hollow King
boss.description: It sits on a throne of fused stalactites, wearing a crown of absolute silence. When it stands, the entire cavern holds its breath.

abyssal_rift.name: The Abyssal Rift
abyssal_rift.description: The wound at the bottom of the world. Reality thins here.

monsters.name: Rift Stalker
monsters.description: It exists in two places at once. Striking one only angers the other.

monsters.name: Void Sentinel
monsters.description: A guardian of nothing, defending an absence with lethal precision.

monsters.name: Entropy Worm
monsters.description: Where it passes, stone crumbles to sand and metal returns to ore.

monsters.name: Fractured Angel
monsters.description: Something holy, broken and remade wrong. It weeps as it fights.

monsters.name: Abyss Maw
monsters.description: Not a creature — a place. A mouth in the ground that is also somehow alive.

monsters.name: Memory Eater
monsters.description: Your hero forgets why they came. Then forgets the exit. Then forgets their name.

monsters.name: The Unnamed
monsters.description: It was something once. Now it is the absence of that something. Its shape hurts to perceive.

monsters.name: Dusk Herald
monsters.description: It speaks in a voice your hero recognizes but cannot place. It offers a deal no sane person would take.

discovery.title: Tear in Reality
discovery.description: A rift in the air itself. Through it, your hero glimpses something they shouldn't — and gains strength from the knowledge.

discovery.title: Fallen Vow-Bearer
discovery.description: Another who swore an oath like yours. They did not make it this far. Their weapon is still sharp.

discovery.title: The Inverse Flame
discovery.description: A fire that burns downward into the stone. It consumes darkness instead of fuel. Your hero warms their hands.

trap.title: Time Distortion
trap.description: Your hero ages a year in a heartbeat, then snaps back. The memory of those unlived days remains.

trap.title: Gravity Well
trap.description: The floor pulls harder. Each step costs twice the effort. Your hero crawls through on willpower alone.

rest.title: Ember Shrine
rest.description: An altar to something older than the dark. The ember on it still burns. Your hero rests in its warmth.

rest.title: The Still Point
rest.description: A place where nothing moves. Not air, not time, not thought. Perfect rest, if brief.

boss.name: Vow-Breaker
boss.description: The final test is not a monster. It is every promise you failed to keep, given form and fury. It knows your name.

scroll_of_clarity.name: Scroll of Clarity
scroll_of_clarity.description: Unfurl it and the world sharpens. Focus comes easier.
scroll_of_clarity.effect: +10% XP from all sources for 24 hours

ember_shard.name: Ember Shard
ember_shard.description: A fragment of living fire. It shields what matters most.
ember_shard.effect: Protects your streak for one missed day

shadowsteel_fragment.name: Shadowsteel Fragment
shadowsteel_fragment.description: Dark metal that reveals what is hidden.
shadowsteel_fragment.effect: Reveals one locked node's details on any tree

heros_ration.name: Hero's Ration
heros_ration.description: Preserved food for the long road. Eat it and press deeper.
heros_ration.effect: Adds +1 bonus floor to your next dungeon delve

rune_of_focus.name: Rune of Focus
rune_of_focus.description: An ancient mark of concentration. The dungeon yields more to those who bear it.

ashen_token.name: Ashen Token
ashen_token.description: A coin from a dead kingdom. Worth nothing — except to those who collect them.
ashen_token.effect: Collectible. Future use TBD (track count on profile).
